title: MD
biography: Miriam Were is a Kenyan public health physician and global health leader who pioneered community-based healthcare in East Africa. She served as WHO Regional Director advisor and chairs the National AIDS Control Council in Kenya. She is one of Africa's most decorated health advocates.
aiSummary: Miriam Were is a public health specialist and global health leader in Kenya. Pioneer of community-based healthcare in East Africa and HIV/AIDS policy advisor. Based in Nairobi, Kenya.
